ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Duke of Traetto|Duke of Sabbioneta|Marquis of Sabbioneta|Count of Rodigo|Count of Fondi|Viceroy of Navarra
ItacPersonItem.Notes: He was born in Fondi (Kingdom of Naples) since his mother, Isabella Colonna, was the daughter of Vespasiano Colonna, Count of Fondi (as well as Duke of Traetto).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
